Class FishersFrenzy

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.ability.FishersFrenzy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Ability, ActiveAbility, PassiveAbility
public final class FishersFrenzy extends Object implements ActiveAbility, PassiveAbility
Active ability unlocked at level 25.

For a configurable duration, all hook wait times are reduced by 60% and the player earns double XP per catch. A buff marker is held in ActiveBuffTracker for the duration and cleared on expiry.

  • Constructor Details

    • FishersFrenzy

      public FishersFrenzy(Supplier<FishingSkillConfig> config, CooldownManager cooldownManager, ActiveBuffTracker buffs, org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin)
      Parameters:
      config - supplier for the current config snapshot
      cooldownManager - the shared cooldown manager
      buffs - the active buff tracker
      plugin - the owning plugin, used to schedule the buff expiry task

  • Method Details

    • id

      public String id()
      Specified by:
      id in interface Ability
      Returns:
      the namespaced identifier, e.g. "fishing:patient-angler"

      Specified by:
      name in interface Ability
      Returns:
      the player-facing display name, e.g. "Patient Angler"

    • description

      public String description()
      Specified by:
      description in interface Ability
      Returns:
      a short player-facing description of what the ability does

      public int unlockLevel()
      Specified by:
      unlockLevel in interface Ability
      Returns:
      the skill level at which this ability is unlocked

    • onActivate

      public void onActivate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
      Called by the framework when the player activates this ability. Applies the buff, starts the cooldown, and schedules buff expiry.
      Specified by:
      onActivate in interface ActiveAbility
      Parameters:
      player - the player who triggered the ability
      uuid - the player's UUID

    • selectionStatus

      public String selectionStatus(UUID uuid)
      Short MiniMessage status string shown as item lore in the ability selection GUI.
      Specified by:
      selectionStatus in interface ActiveAbility
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a MiniMessage status string

    • statusLevel

      public StatusLevel statusLevel(UUID uuid)
      Description copied from interface: ActiveAbility
      Returns the current state of this ability for GUI display purposes. The ActiveAbilityCoordinator uses this to select an appropriate display material without parsing the ActiveAbility.selectionStatus(UUID) string.

      Defaults to StatusLevel.READY. Override whenever the ability has pending, cooldown, or active-buff states.

      Specified by:
      statusLevel in interface ActiveAbility
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      the current status level

    • isFrenzyActive

      public boolean isFrenzyActive(UUID uuid)
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      true if Fisher's Frenzy is currently active for this player

    • accepts

      public boolean accepts(PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveAbility
      Returns true if this passive should fire for the given trigger.

      Typically implemented as one or more instanceof checks: 

          return trigger instanceof FishCastTrigger
        || trigger instanceof FishCatchTrigger;

      Specified by:
      accepts in interface PassiveAbility
      Parameters:
      trigger - the trigger token about to be dispatched
      Returns:
      true if this passive handles the trigger

    • onPassiveTrigger

      public void onPassiveTrigger(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid, PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Contributes cast timer reduction or XP multiplier while the buff is active. Does nothing if Fisher's Frenzy is not currently running for this player.
      Specified by:
      onPassiveTrigger in interface PassiveAbility
      Parameters:
      player - the player the trigger concerns
      uuid - the player's UUID
      trigger - the trigger token; cast to the expected concrete type

    • triggerCondition

      public String triggerCondition()
      Description copied from interface: PassiveAbility
      Short player-facing description of when this passive fires, shown in the skill detail GUI. Example: "On casting a fishing rod."
      Specified by:
      triggerCondition in interface PassiveAbility
      Returns:
      when this passive fires, shown in the skill detail GUI
